scope: This audit proves the presentation artifact, teammate review workflow, static deployment, and repository-backed demo package. It does not prove live robot execution.
liveAlias: configured by Vercel preview or production deployment
notProofOf: new robot telemetry from the VEX hardware

phases.title: Story and source truth
phases.summary: The presentation grounds the story in Self-Modeling Machines, in Language, the X35 premise, VEX V5 hardware, Raspberry Pi vision, AprilTag observations, yellow ball evidence, and explicit truth labels.

evidence.proves: speaker scripts, source truth, and the approved 10-minute structure
visible deck copy and speaker order
required premise tokens and truth labels are present

phases.title: Flow assets and video openers
phases.summary: The deck uses Flow-generated videos and stills as the public visual layer, with browser-safe sound unlock and fullscreen video cleanup.

evidence.proves: fullscreen Vexy opener exists in the package
Grace speaker video exists in the package
presentation playback hides review UI and unlocks video mode

phases.title: Technical core and diagrams
phases.summary: The deck shows the hardware body, self-model premise, learning loop, trusted motion gates, evidence packet, and selectable diagram options for each speaker.

evidence.proves: five diagram options per speaker are defined
active diagram boards and technical sections render in the deck
diagram counts, technical terms, and speaker sections are enforced

phases.title: Speaker notes and review workflow
phases.summary: Each teammate has a direct review lane, private speaker notes, five copywriting versions, a simple cheat sheet card, note suggestions, pin comments, diagram choices, ready checks, review-link export/import, and a sendable handoff page.

evidence.proves: direct review cards and one-click copy-ready Slack message exist
all four speakers can review notes, five copy options, and a cheat sheet, edit a browser-local draft in place, choose a favorite copy route, and copy or import a portable speaker asset packet
speaker notes, copywriting versions, and cheat sheets are captured as source data
review mode, pin comments, export/import, and speaker filtering are implemented
review link round-trips notes, pins, diagram choices, ready state, handoff copy, and playback cleanup

phases.title: Rehearsal and run of show
phases.summary: The run-of-show page totals 10:00 and the rehearsal console lets the team time the run-through, check sound/video/handoff/truth-label proof, and copy a rehearsal report. The team still needs a live rehearsal with sound and speaker confirmation.

evidence.proves: scene order and timing are documented
timed rehearsal, proof-check console, and speaker signoff packet workflow exist for the live run-through
copy-ready rehearsal call exists, with Phase 5 still marked manual-required until a live rehearsal with sound happens
rehearsal console can start, persist proof checks, and copy a report

evidence.proofNeeded: each speaker confirms timing after a real rehearsal

phases.title: Ship, share, and proof
phases.summary: The capstone repo package is Vercel-ready, the team handoff is sendable, and the shareback proof board can bulk-parse returned review links, collect rehearsal notes, make robot evidence conditional on live-robot claims, and copy a targeted missing-proof nudge. Teammates must still send links back, and any live robot claim still needs real run evidence.

evidence.proves: audience deck can be deployed from the capstone repo Vercel root
team handoff page is included in the deployable package
returned review links can be bulk-parsed by owner, and rehearsal report text, conditional robot evidence, missing-proof nudges, and final shareback packets can be managed locally
copy-ready proof collection message exists, with Phase 6 still marked manual-required until teammates send review links and robot evidence is attached for any live robot claim

evidence.proofNeeded: teammates return review links and any live robot run evidence is attached separately

nextHumanActions: teammates send review links back to Grace
run one live rehearsal with sound enabled
decide whether to add backend persistence for shared comments
attach real robot run telemetry before claiming live robot success
blockedUntilBackend: shared persistence requires a Vercel Function plus KV, Supabase, Neon, or another database
multi-user live comments cannot sync across browsers with static localStorage alone
blockedUntilRobotEvidence: live robot success claims require a real run, telemetry, operator result, or video proof
Slot 4 return-home claims require current repo or robot evidence proving that exact routine
